title.v: số dư đầu kỳ của hóa đơn

command.text: declare @baseCurrency varchar(32), @baseCurrencyName nvarchar(128), @unitName nvarchar(1023) select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @baseCurrencyName = case when @@language = 'v' then rtrim(ten_nt) else rtrim(ten_nt2) end from dmnt where ma_nt = @baseCurrency select @unitName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit select 'this._baseCurrency=''' + @baseCurrency + ''';this._baseCurrencyName=''' + @baseCurrencyName + ''';this._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + '''; activeForm(this);' as message return

if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_nt = '') begin select rtrim(a.val) as ma_nt, 1 as ty_gia, b.t_tt0 as t_tt_nt0 from options a, @@table b where a.name = 'm_ma_nt0' and b.stt_rec = @stt_rec return end

&UpdateConflict;
declare @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512), @baseCurrency varchar(32), @round int select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã có chứng từ thanh toán cho hóa đơn này, không thể xóa được.' else N'Can not delete this voucher, It was received or paid.' end select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @round = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where name = 'm_round_tien'

declare @@master nvarchar(32) select @@master = '@@table' &CommandGetIdentityNumber; if @ma_nt = @baseCurrency select @ma_nt = '', @ty_gia = 0, @t_tt1 = @t_tt_qd0, @t_tt_nt1 = 0, @t_tt0 = @t_tt_nt0, @t_tt_nt0 = 0, @t_tt_qd = @t_tt_qd0 else select @t_tt1 = round(@t_tt_qd0*@ty_gia, @round), @t_tt_nt1 = @t_tt_qd0, @t_tt0 = case when @t_tt_nt <> 0 then round(@t_tt_nt0*@t_tt/@t_tt_nt, @round) else 0 end, @t_tt_qd = @t_tt_qd0 select @ma_ct = @@id, @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID
update @@table set ngay_ct0 = ngay_ct where stt_rec = @stt_rec exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$UpdateInvoiceNumber '@@table', @stt_rec, 1 select @stt_rec as stt_rec return

if not exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin select @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end
if exists(select 1 from @@table where loai_tt = 1 and left(stt_rec_tt, 10) = left(@stt_rec, 10)) begin select @$updateConflict as message return end

if @ma_nt = @baseCurrency update @@table set ma_nt = '', @ty_gia = 0, t_tt1 = @t_tt_qd0, t_tt_nt1 = 0, t_tt0 = @t_tt_nt0, t_tt_nt0 = 0, t_tt_qd = @t_tt_qd0, ngay_ct0 = ngay_ct, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec else update @@table set t_tt1 = round(@t_tt_qd0*@ty_gia, @round), t_tt_nt1 = @t_tt_qd0, t_tt0 = case when @t_tt_nt <> 0 then round(@t_tt_nt0* @t_tt/@t_tt_nt, @round) else 0 end, t_tt_qd = @t_tt_qd0, ngay_ct0 = ngay_ct, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$UpdateInvoiceNumber '@@table', @stt_rec, 1

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmkh where ma_kh = @ma_kh and kh_yn = 1) begin select case when b.loai_tk = 1 and b.tk_cn = 1 then a.tk else '' end as tk, b.ten_tk%l, a.ma_tt, c.ten_tt%l from dmkh a left join dmtk b on a.tk = b.tk left join dmtt c on a.ma_tt = c.ma_tt where a.ma_kh = @ma_kh return end
